title: Cabaret Impedimenta
company: John-Luke Roberts. Amazing acts try to entertain you under increasingly difficult circumstances. Spin the wheel, and find out if a singer can still sing with a bubble machine pointed point-blank in their face, or how a professional hula hooper gets on while haunted by a Victorian ghost, or if there is any point to ventriloquism when the lights are off, or if a comedian’s jokes work when the microphone is held in the mouth of the oldest audience member.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
